memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description:
Hugh married Isabel Aguillon, the daughter of Robert Aguillon and Joan de Ferrers and heiress of Addington. They had one son, Sir Thomas, who married Agnes de Grandison.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel d'Aguillon於1258年3月25日出生在英國素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵時，她的父親Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey33歲，母親Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'26歲。她於1281年與Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph在英國英格蘭素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1323年5月28日在她的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel d'Aguillon于1258年3月25日出生在英国素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵时，她的父亲Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey33岁，母亲Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'26岁。她于1281年与Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph在英国英格兰素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1323年5月28日在她的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: d'Aguillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Jesus, Pablo, Juan, Agustin, Carlos, Ernesto, Manuel, Roberto, Ruben, Santiago.
habitational name from any of several places called Aguillón in Spain (Asturias or Galicia), or Aguillon in Var, France.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel d'Aguillon was born on 25 March 1258, in Addington, Surrey, England, her father, Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey, was 33 and her mother, Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder', was 26. She married Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph in 1281, in Addington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 28 May 1323, in her hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel d'Aguillon est née le 25 mars 1258, à Addington, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder', avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph en 1281, à Addington, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 mai 1323, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel d'Aguillon am 25. März 1258 in Addington, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey 33 und ihre Mutter Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' 26. Sie hat 1281 in Addington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. Mai 1323 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel d'Aguillon è nata il il 25 marzo 1258 nel Addington, Surrey, England, sua padre, Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder', aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph nel 1281, nel Addington, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 maggio 1323, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Aguillonが1258年3月25日にイギリススリーアッドイントンで生まれた時，父Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surreyは33歳，母Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'は26歳であった。1281年にイギリスイギリススリーアッドイントンでSir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolphと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1323年5月28日に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Aguillon(이)가 1258년 3월 25일 영국 수리 애딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1281년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 애딩턴에서 Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 5월 28일 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.Addington, Surrey, , England: Addington, Sūþrīge, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.25 March 1258–28 May 1323: 25 de março de 1258–28 de maio de 1323
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel d'Aguillon nasceu em 25 de março de 1258, em Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder', tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph em 1281, em Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de maio de 1323, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel d'Aguillon родилась 25 марта 1258 г. в местности аддингтон, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder', 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph в 1281 г. в местности аддингтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 мая 1323 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.25 March 1258–28 May 1323: 25 de marzo de 1258–28 de mayo de 1323
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel d'Aguillon nació el 25 de marzo de 1258, en Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder', tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph en 1281, en Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de mayo de 1323, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
